name: John Drew Smith Tennis Center
description: Come play pickleball at John Drew Smith Tennis Center in Macon, GA! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, a pro shop or equipment store, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Randy Stephens Tennis Center
description: Randy Stephens Tennis Center is a place to play pickleball in Macon, GA. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, water, and lights.
fees: Fee required — $2 per player before 5p. $3 per player after 5p.

name: Rhythm and Rally
description: Rhythm and Rally is a place to play pickleball in Macon, GA. There are 32 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like locker rooms, restrooms, water, a pro shop or equipment store, and food.
fees: Fee required — Open Play is $5 per person during business hours; membership is required for other hours, reservations, and possibly events.

name: Rhythm & Rally Sports & Events
description: Membership is not required, but you will need a CourtReserve account. Courts 9-16 are always available for skill-based open-play. Reservations may be made through CourtReserve on the remaining 24 courts on a first-come, first-served basis.

name: River North Country Club
description: River North Country Club is a place to play pickleball in Macon, GA. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, and water. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Sandy Beach Water Park
description: Come play pickleball at Sandy Beach Water Park in Macon, GA! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Tattnall Pickleball Center
description: Tattnall Pickleball Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Macon, GA. There are 17 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include lights.

name: Tattnall Square Pickleball Center
description: Tattnall Square Pickleball Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Macon, GA. There are 26 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.
fees: Fee required — Court fees are $2 per player from opening to 5:00 PM and $3 from 5:00 PM to close.
